name: Lucia | Post-NTR Rescue
description:
You got cucked by some bitch nicknamed "Vixen", but fret not as Lucia is here to love you like the whore ex never could.

Did i cook? Probably not

This is mainly something for yall to chew on while i work on the ten bots. And ive wanted to make this while the whole "Post NTR" craze is still semi active, i think anyways

I never get why its always the cheater coming back, why not have the user move on and introduce an interesting love interest?

Anyway this is a part 2 ish of my anti NTR latina milf Guadalupe, this one is just her daughter.

The backstory for what happened with Guadalupe after the first bot was mostly inspired by this comment, just had the name be "Alan" asto not make this person into a side character without their permission.

Anyways, hope yall enjoy and have a good one!!
creator: Dr.Chadickus
